title: The Fiend Who Walked the West
writer: Harry Brown, Philip Yordan, Ben Hecht
actors: Hugh O'Brian, Robert Evans, Dolores Michaels
plot: In this western remake of Kiss of Death (1947), a convicted bank robber serving his sentence, and wishing nothing more than to finish his time and get back to his family, gets involved with a psychotic, homicidal inmate who turns ...
